h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

failures.excerpt: [checks the station label and slides the surface card back against the upward blank arrow] If this station says track, then the label is “track on cart.” If it says table, “table on cart.” The covered motion arrow is still trying to pull my

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to rely on the physical pencil-tail check and card order to successfully draw the arrows.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: The pencil-tail check is not settling the catch-first pull; it still leaves the hunter in charge of the hand. New release gate for the copy: before any arrow is marked, fill the line aloud, “Energy moves from ___ into ___.”
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor diagnoses that the physical pencil-tail check is insufficient to override the cognitive pull of the 'hunter' frame, and dynamically shifts the task representation to a verbal release gate.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.
